name: WM8960 Stereo Audio Codec
description: Cirrus/Wolfson WM8960 stereo CODEC with 1W class-D speaker drivers and headphone amp, I2S audio + 2-wire control (write-only, addr 0x1A), QFN-32 5x5. Raspberry Pi / ESP32 audio HAT staple. EP = analogue GND.
dimensions_source: Wolfson WM8960 datasheet (QFN-32 DM033.D / MO-220 VHHD-5): body 5x5x0.9, pitch 0.5, lead 0.25x0.4, EP 3.45 sq. Land pads 0.28x0.7 centers 4.7 c-c derived per IPC-7351 (EP clearance 0.275). Pinout p.6 (CCW from pin-1).
